_provenance.subject_pin: menno420/superbot-games @ e3930f134119dd36d9e7f37a7dccb4f4b33e3805 — re-verified FIRSTHAND this session (Q-0120): the pinned commit fetched into the session clone and games/dnd/core/resolver.py (_allowed_options prefix slice scene.options[:limit], limit = min(len, menu_width(xp), MAX_MENU_SIZE); clamp resolves scene.option(scene.default_option_id) on the FULL scene), games/exploration/quest/leverage.py (BASE_MENU_WIDTH=2, MAX_MENU_WIDTH=4, XP_PER_EXTRA_OPTION=500), games/dnd/data/scenes.py (3 scenes, tuples + defaults below), games/dnd/core/models.py (MAX_MENU_SIZE=4, the §4.1 'always ON the menu' clamp promise), games/dnd/core/effects.py (escort_step mints TIER_CAPS[RewardTier.I] per application via offer→accept→apply_event→grant_rewards), games/exploration/quest/catalog.py (TIER_CAPS/GLOBAL_MAX), games/dnd/sim/menu_sim.py (_FULL_MENU_XP = 5_000) all read at that SHA
_provenance.hermetic: the runner reads ONLY this fixtures.json — zero repo/network reads at verdict time (the P017–V073 precedent)
_provenance.firsthand_finding_disclosed: the literal shipped waystation_gate tuple is (enter_common_room, circle_to_treeline, rest_at_gate) — (N, M, Z)-positioned under the pinned role map, NOT (M, N, Z); the idea file's own §4(b) disclosure covers this (gate mints nothing, only the edge placement moves) and convention C1 + gate F1b make the equivalence an asserted check, never an assumption

scenes.role_semantics: M = the mint/progress option, N = the flavour option, Z = the safe no-op clamp default (the idea file's pinned role map)

mint.note: PER-APP = shipped semantics, every escort_step application mints (includes the double-mint arc); ONCE = mint-at-most-once per episode (the ORDER 006 item (6) alternative ruling); bands are evaluated on PER-APP, ONCE is the sensitivity leg

B2.name: GREEDY-FARMER
B2.rule: picks a surfaced mint, else a surfaced progress edge (next_scene_id != null), else uniform over the prefix; ties by prefix position (never binds: at most one mint and at most one progress edge per scene)

B3.name: STORY-DM
B3.rule: prefers role N, then Z, then M among surfaced options (deterministic)

B4.name: CLAMP-p
B4.rule: with probability p returns an off-menu id and clamps to the FULL-scene default (role Z: rest_noop, stay); else B1 uniform over the prefix

seeds_registered.re_registration_note: the PROPOSAL 063 drafting-time seeds 20261389–20261392 were registered above the then-high-water 20261388, but the V075/V076 slice consumed 20261389–20261558 (sim-lab PR #139 @ d0a5a75, NEW FLEET HIGH-WATER 20261558) before this slice ran; per the registry convention (strictly-above, contiguous) this slice re-registers 20261559–20261562 in the same four roles, disclosed here BEFORE the runner

bands.MONOTONE: B1 PER-APP expected mints at T=20 non-decreasing w2 -> w3, and the w3 == w4 identity holds (exact-arm cells)

POSITIVE_FLOOR.metric: B1 long-run (absorbing-regime) mint rate at w=2

FARMER.metric: B2 PER-APP currency at T=20, w=2

bands.CONFORM: DEFAULT-IN-PREFIX(2) true: the clamp default (role Z) is legally surfaceable at width 2 (Z in the first two positions of the policy permutation)

decision_rule.registered_order: gates F1–F4 first (any F1/F4 failure -> NULL naming the mismatching pin); then APPROVE-REORDER iff >= 1 of the 6 policies passes ALL FOUR bands (name the passing set + the recommended data-only scenes.py reorder); REJECT-REORDER iff no policy passes all four (certify the {0, 1/2} width-2 B1 rate partition + the attainable band-profile table as the citable result; recommendation escalates to the named mechanic change — width must stop selecting by prefix, e.g. per-option min_width data or width-indexed option sets — intent staying the lane's per the V044/V046 posture, with NZM/ZNM priced as the interim zero-floor menu)
decision_rule.registered_claim_to_certify: the w2 B1 long-run rate partition across all 6 policies is {0, 1/2} with nothing between (rate = [M in prefix(2)]/2), forcing MONOTONE and POSITIVE-FLOOR to be jointly unsatisfiable by ANY data-only reorder

gates.F1: fixture identity — the width formula reproduces fixture_table at every pinned xp; every scene's roles/effects/defaults/shipped positions internally consistent (defaults = role Z, index 2 in every shipped tuple; mints exactly on escort_step; treeline_watch absorbing at every width and ordering); TIER_CAPS[I] = (5, 25, 10); GLOBAL_MAX = (20, 120, 50); _FULL_MENU_XP = 5000 present as the dedup witness
gates.F1b: literal-shipped equivalence (convention C1, asserted not assumed) — for every scene and every width w in {2,3,4}, the surfaced option SET under the literal shipped tuple equals the surfaced SET under the MNZ policy permutation; hence the SHIPPED decision cell is the MNZ policy cell for every set-based behaviour

F2.statement: exact arm reproduces SHIPPED x B1 long-run mint rate 1/2 at w=2 and 1/3 at w=3/4, and E[mints, T=20] exactly:

gates.F3: w=4 == w=3 in EVERY exact-arm cell (3-option scenes; the pinned identity, not an assumption)

F4.statement: by-hand 2-turn SHIPPED x B1 x w=2 trace matches the recursion cell-for-cell in exact arithmetic

conventions_disclosed_before_runner.C1: role-set behavioural equivalence: all four behaviours read the surfaced option SET plus role labels, never intra-prefix position (B2's positional tie-break never binds — at most one mint and at most one progress edge per scene menu); the literal shipped gate tuple is (N, M, Z)-positioned and prefix-SET-identical to MNZ at every width (gate F1b asserts this); the SHIPPED cell is therefore the MNZ policy cell, per the idea file's own §4(b) disclosure
conventions_disclosed_before_runner.C2: episode sharing across accountings: dynamics are accounting-independent (no behaviour reads mint counts), so each MC episode yields BOTH PER-APP and ONCE metrics from one trajectory — paired arms, disclosed; exact-arm accountings are computed separately from the same recursion
conventions_disclosed_before_runner.C3: per-cell MC substreams: random.Random seeded with int.from_bytes(sha256('{leg_seed}|{policy}|{behaviour}|w{width}').digest()[:8], 'big'); the four registered base seeds are the ONLY leg seeds; every constructed RNG is counted and the registry printed
conventions_disclosed_before_runner.C4: at most ONE uniform draw per turn (single-threshold cumulative inversion over [clamp segment +] prefix segments); fully deterministic turns (B2/B3 with a forced pick) draw zero; total draws per leg counted and printed
conventions_disclosed_before_runner.C5: metric definitions: a no-op turn resolves effect rest_noop (including B4 clamp turns); distinct scenes = |visited set| at the checkpoint; currency = 10 x mints (PER-APP) and 10 x E[mints_ONCE] (ONCE); P(>=1 mint) is the ONCE mean by construction
conventions_disclosed_before_runner.C6: long-run mint rate = absorption-weighted per-turn mint probability over the behaviour-induced chain on the 3-scene DAG (road -> gate -> treeline, road -> treeline, no back-edges), computed exactly: every state is either absorbing (all chosen actions stay) or exits with positive probability, so the chain absorbs a.s. and the long-run rate is the absorbing state's per-turn mint probability, weighted by absorption probabilities
conventions_disclosed_before_runner.C7: twin tolerance: |mc_mean - exact| <= 3 x (sample_std / sqrt(n)) per checked cell metric (E[mints] PER-APP and ONCE at each T); zero-variance cells require exact equality
conventions_disclosed_before_runner.C8: w=4 MC cells run on their OWN substreams (F3 is asserted on the exact arm; MC w4 is checked against the same exact values within 3 sigma, not against MC w3 bytes)
conventions_disclosed_before_runner.C9: B4 clamp semantics: the clamp resolves the FULL-scene default (role Z — rest_noop, stay), counts as a clamped no-op turn, and is NOT a legal surface (CONFORM reads the width-2 prefix only)
conventions_disclosed_before_runner.C10: legs: A (20261559) = all 90 dynamic cells; B (20261560) = independent full twin; B4-stress (20261561) = the 36 B4 cells re-run; holdout (20261562) = the SHIPPED x B1 cells (3 widths) re-run; every leg checked against the exact arm under C7; serialization: exact values as canonical 'p/q' strings, floats via repr, json sort_keys=True

drafter_disclosed_never_gated.note: the drafter's disclosed landing, re-derived from scratch with zero trust and COMPARED, never gated (the V073 discipline)
